design_philosophy.visual_style: High-Density Data, Swiss-Style Grid, Cool Corporate Tones

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md shadow-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md shadow-sm text-sm font-medium
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-md shadow-sm text-sm font-medium

inputs.default: border-slate-300 focus:ring-slate-500 focus:border-slate-500 rounded-md shadow-sm text-sm

cards.dashboard_metric: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.data_container: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-slate-500 border-b border-slate-200
tables.row: hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors duration-150 border-b border-slate-100 last:border-0

status_badges.active: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
status_badges.pending: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-amber-100 text-amber-800
status_badges.expired: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-800
status_badges.inactive: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-800

login_background.usage: Full screen background with overlay for login page

icons.usage: Use consistent stroke width. Use muted colors for decorative icons, primary colors for action icons.

charts.style: Clean, minimal grid lines, tooltip with custom styling

maps.library: react-map-gl (optional) or static placeholder for MVP

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Form inputs must have associated labels.
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, section).

universal_guidelines.state_management: Use React Context for auth/global state. Use local state for form inputs.
universal_guidelines.api_calls: Use centralized axios instance with interceptors for JWT.
universal_guidelines.data_fetching: Use useEffect with proper cleanup or a lightweight fetch wrapper.
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and major containers.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the specific folder structure first (pages/auth, pages/vehicles, components/ui, layouts).
2. Implement the Authentication Context (AuthProvider) to handle JWT tokens and role-based protection.
3. Create the Dashboard Layout with a collapsible sidebar and sticky header.
4. Build the core 'Data Table' component as it will be reused for Vehicles, Drivers, and Tenders.
5. Use 'recharts' for the dashboard analytics widgets.
6. Ensure all forms have client-side validation using Zod + React Hook Form before sending to API.
7. Mock the GPS map using a static image or basic placeholder if mapbox token is not available.
8. Stick to the 'Slate' color palette for a professional look. Avoid using pure black (#000000).
9. For file uploads, create a dedicated 'DocumentUpload' component that shows progress and preview.
